##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregates of colorless to pale purple bladed crystals associated with green variscite. The apparent green color of gordonite is due to the variscite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070437
